subject: [PATCH v4 01/21] mm/swap: decouple swap cache from physical swap infrastructure

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch decouples the swap cache from the physical swap infrastructure, preparing for virtualization of swap space. It removes swap cache related helpers from the swap table and repurposes the remaining infrastructure to serve as a rmap (physical -> virtual swap mapping). The patch also introduces a single global lock to synchronize swap cache accesses temporarily, which will be replaced by swap clusters once the swap cache is moved to the virtual swap layer.
